raw_consumer_statement:
Date of Transaction : XX/XX/year>2024 Amount request for Balance Transfer : {$13000.00} Balance Transfer Fees : {$520.00} I did a balance transfer on XX/XX/XXXX to this Debit card account ending in XXXX. 
Although Barclays reported that the current amount of {$13000.00} has been transferred to the account I did not receive any funds up until now. I've called customer service to get an update but I was told that it may take a while to post on my XXXX XXXX account. I waited for so long that the status was already showing processed from Barclays and wanting me to pay the XXXX XXXX that is due on XX/XX/XXXX, added to my monthly statement without receiving the funds on my XXXX XXXX account. 

The options from the application are Credit or Loan account but I ended up putting my Debit card number ( Which in fact should go to the bank account number if money were transferred ) which they should have stopped and canceled the transaction but then proceeded with the requested action. I asked if this could be reverted but since the transaction had been posted they couldn't help but investigate.
